## Checklist

### Code Quality

- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] No console.log or debug statements left in code
- [ ] TypeScript types are properly defined (no `any` unless necessary)
- [ ] Code is properly commented where needed

### Testing & Validation

- [ ] All tests passing (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Type checking passing (`pnpm type-check`)
- [ ] Linting passing (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Code formatted (`pnpm format`)
- [ ] Pre-commit hooks passing

### Documentation

- [ ] README updated (if needed)
- [ ] API documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] Architecture docs updated (if needed)
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic

### Dependencies

- [ ] No new dependencies added
- [ ] New dependencies added and justified in PR description
- [ ] Dependencies follow version policy (see CLAUDE.md)

### Monorepo Considerations

<!-- If changes affect multiple packages -->

- [ ] Changes are isolated to single package
- [ ] Changes affect multiple packages (list them):
- [ ] Workspace dependencies updated correctly
